states.emptyDesc: Try selecting a longer period or upload tyre records.

section1.title: Section 1 - Executive Summary
section1.p1: During the {period}, {company} operated a fleet of {fleetSize} vehicles with {records} tyre records processed. Total tyre expenditure for the period reached {spend}, with the fleet delivering an average Cost Per Kilometre of {cpk}/km.
section1.momImproved: Month-over-month cost has improved by {pct}, indicating a positive cost trajectory.
section1.momIncreased: Month-over-month cost has increased by {pct}, indicating a worsening cost trajectory.
section1.p2: Operational risk remains a priority concern. A total of {criticalCount} critical-risk tyres were identified in the period, representing {criticalPct} of all records. Overall failure rate stands at {failureRate}. Inspection compliance reached {inspectionCompliance} against a target of 85%.
section1.p2RootCause: The primary root cause driving failures is {rootCause}, accounting for {pct} of all tyre events.
section1.keyWinText: {brand} delivered the best composite performance with CPK of {cpk}/km and failure rate of {rate}. Expanding its fleet share is recommended.
section1.keyConcernText: {site} records the highest failure rate at {rate}. An immediate site audit is required to identify and address root causes at this location.
section1.p4: Annualised tyre spend is projected at {projectedAnnual}.
section1.p4Savings: Closing the CPK gap between fleet average and best-in-fleet performance represents a cost optimisation opportunity of approximately {savings} annually.
section1.p4Closing: Average tyre life stands at {avgLife} km, with fleet availability at {availability}. Management attention is directed to the Recommendations and Action Plan sections for prioritised interventions.

section3.title: Section 3 - Root Cause Analysis
section3.subtitle: Failure driver classification across all tyre events in period

inflation.label: Inflation Issues
inflation.prevention: Implement weekly pressure checks, install TPMS sensors, calibrate gauges quarterly.

alignment.label: Alignment / Suspension
alignment.prevention: Schedule alignment checks every 20,000 km, inspect after impact events.

driver.label: Driver Behavior
driver.prevention: Deploy telematics, run defensive driving training, review high-loss records monthly.

road.label: Road / Load Conditions
road.prevention: Map high-risk routes, enforce load compliance, carry puncture repair kits.

maintenance.label: Maintenance Quality
maintenance.prevention: Audit workshop standards, enforce mandatory service intervals, verify torque spec.

manufacturing.label: Manufacturing Defects
manufacturing.prevention: Raise warranty claims, audit supplier quality, inspect all incoming tyres.

other.label: Other / Unclassified
other.prevention: Investigate individual records and assign to appropriate root cause category.

section4.title: Section 4 - Financial Impact
section4.subtitle: Cost analysis, budget tracking, and financial projections

section5.title: Section 5 - Risk Assessment
section5.subtitle: Fleet risk exposure, site matrix, and risk trend analysis

section6.title: Section 6 - Recommendations
section6.subtitle: Prioritised management recommendations based on fleet intelligence

criticalRemoval.title: Immediate Critical Tyre Removal Programme
criticalRemoval.description: {pct} of fleet tyres are classified as Critical risk. An immediate inspection and forced removal programme must be initiated across all sites to prevent blowouts and road incidents.
criticalRemoval.impact: Avoidance of estimated {amount} in accident liability and emergency replacement costs.

inspectionCompliance.title: Enforce Inspection Compliance Across All Sites
inspectionCompliance.description: Fleet inspection compliance is at {pct}, well below the 85% target. Missing inspections are a leading indicator of tyre failures. A mandatory compliance enforcement programme with site manager accountability must be implemented.
inspectionCompliance.impact: Compliance improvement to 90%+ historically reduces failure rate by 20-30%, saving approximately {amount} annually.

procurementReview.title: Procurement Review: Replace {brand} with Higher-Performing Alternatives
procurementReview.description: {brand} has the lowest composite performance score in the fleet. CPK of {cpk}/km and failure rate of {rate} significantly exceed fleet averages. Procurement should evaluate contract terms and initiate supplier transition.
procurementReview.impact: Switching lower-performing brands to {bestBrand}-equivalent performance could yield {amount} in annual savings.

tpmsDeployment.title: Deploy Tyre Pressure Monitoring System (TPMS) Fleet-Wide
tpmsDeployment.description: Inflation issues are the primary root cause, accounting for {pct} of all tyre events. A fleet-wide TPMS deployment combined with driver training will directly target the highest-impact failure driver.
tpmsDeployment.impact: Estimated {amount} in avoidable tyre costs per period.

driverBehaviour.title: Driver Behaviour Telematics Programme
driverBehaviour.description: Driver behaviour contributes to {pct} of tyre incidents. Deploying telematics with speed, harsh braking, and cornering monitoring - combined with driver-specific coaching - will reduce this cause category significantly.
driverBehaviour.impact: {amount} in potential cost avoidance per period.

scrapRateInvestigation.title: Scrap Rate Root Cause Investigation
scrapRateInvestigation.description: Scrap rate at {pct} exceeds acceptable limits. Each scrapped tyre represents full cost loss. A structured investigation into premature removal drivers - including improper inflation, fitment errors, and road damage - must be completed within 30 days.
scrapRateInvestigation.impact: Reducing scrap rate by 50% saves approximately {amount} per period.

siteAudit.title: Site Audit: {site} - Highest Failure Rate
siteAudit.description: {site} has the highest failure rate at {pct}. A structured site audit covering inspection compliance, tyre fitment practices, road conditions, and driver behaviour is required to understand and remediate site-specific failure drivers.
siteAudit.impact: Bringing {site} to fleet average failure rate could save {amount} per period.

cpkOptimisation.title: Fleet CPK Optimisation Initiative
cpkOptimisation.description: Fleet average CPK is {fleetCpk}/km versus best-in-fleet of {bestCpk}/km. Closing this gap through vendor rationalisation, position optimisation, and maintenance improvements represents significant financial opportunity.

downtimeMaintenance.title: Priority Maintenance for High-Downtime Vehicles
downtimeMaintenance.description: {assets} are responsible for disproportionate downtime. A dedicated maintenance review and tyre specification upgrade for these vehicles will improve fleet availability and operational efficiency.
downtimeMaintenance.impact: Estimated {hours} hours of recovered vehicle availability per period.

tyreRotation.title: Tyre Rotation Compliance Enforcement
tyreRotation.description: Implementing a systematic tyre rotation schedule at 10,000 km intervals will equalise wear across positions, extend average tyre life, and reduce position-specific failure rates, particularly on steer axles.
tyreRotation.impact: Projected tyre life extension of 10-15%, saving approximately {amount} per period.

actions.removeCritical: Remove all {count} Critical-risk tyres from service immediately
actions.auditSites: Audit top 3 highest-failure sites with on-site inspection team
actions.mandatePressureCheck: Mandate 100% tyre pressure check before vehicle dispatch
actions.issueCorrectiveNotices: Issue corrective action notices to all sites below 70% inspection compliance
actions.procurementReviewBrand: Initiate procurement review for lowest-performing tyre brand(s)
actions.deployTelematics: Deploy telematics driver behaviour scoring across all high-failure vehicles
actions.implementRotation: Implement tyre rotation schedule at 10,000 km for all fleet vehicles
actions.completeTpms: Complete TPMS sensor installation across all fleet vehicles
actions.monthlyReview: Establish monthly executive tyre KPI review cadence
actions.negotiateContracts: Negotiate revised contracts with top-3 performing vendors based on CPK data
